calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Duncan Lemmon, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Julie Bernstein, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Alonzo Brown, dba AJB Corp., and JB Investment and Loan, LLC.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Federal Truth-In-Lending Disclosure
Statement dated 06/02/06---------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Federal Truth-In-Lending Disclosure
Statement dated 06/02/06---------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---One page document signed by Alonzo Brown & Julie
Berstein dated 06/06/06----------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Grant Deed dated 07/22/06--------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 5---Letter from Bernard Hughes to Keith Jones,
with attachments, dated 03/20/08-------------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Julie Bernstein, and against defendants Alonzo Brown, dba AJB Corp., and JB Investment and Loan, LLC as follows:

Defendant Alonzo Brown, dba AJB Corp. - Damages in the amount of $1,250,000.00. Discovery Sanctions in the amount of $735.00. Costs in the amount of $335.00, for a Total Judgment of $1,251,070.00.

Defendant JB Investment and Loan, LLC - Damages in the amount of $1,000,000.00. Discovery Sanctions in the amount of $695.00. Costs in the amount of $335.00, for a Total Judgment of $1,001,030.00.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Duncan Lemmon, Esq. for Plaintiff/Moving party

Tentative ruling was adopted as follows: Plaintiff Julie Bernstein's Motion To Enforce Court Orders Compelling Defendants Alonzo Brown And JB Investment And Loan, LLC And Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion must be served and filed at least 16 court days in advance of the hearing, plus 5 days for mailing. This motion was filed on February 11, 2008. The first day this motion could have been heard is March 11, 2008. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED (612/EAH)

Notice And Motion To Compel Deft Jb Investment And Loan, Llc To Produce Person Most Acknowledgeable And Documents For Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Martin Eng's Motion To Compel Defendant JB Investment And Loan, LLC To Produce Person Most Knowledgeable And Documents For Deposition is granted. Defendant JB Investment And Loan, LLC is ordered to appear for its deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff. Defendant's failure to appear was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant JB Investment And Loan, LLC in the amount of $695, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
